data.job_description: We are looking for a Staff MLE to lead our ranking and recommendations team. You will own end-to-end ML systems, mentor senior engineers, and drive architectural decisions for production-scale personalization systems. Required: 7+ years ML engineering, deep PyTorch expertise, experience with large-scale recommender systems.
Join our AI research team to advance LLM-based document understanding for financial documents. You will publish at top-tier venues, build novel retrieval systems, and deploy research to production.
